role_summary: the valuation analyst supports valuation engagements by analyzing financial data and  applying valuation methodologies for businesses, assets, and secur ities.
responsibilities: • perform business and asset valuations   • build financial models and forecasts   • apply valuation techniques (dcf, comparable, precedent transactions)   • analyze financial statements and market data   • prepare valuation reports and presenta tions   • support transaction and advisory engagements
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • strong financial modeling and valuation skills   • analytical and detail -oriented mindset
